calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Continued To Aug-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 15, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings By Defendant Karman Healthcare, Inc.
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT KARMAN HEALTHCARE INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Ryan Ichinaga, Esq. of SPINELLI, DONALD 4 NOTT, Tel: 916.448.7888, for defendant/moving party Karman Healthcare;
Cliff Chanler, Esq. of CHANLER LLC, Tel: 203.594.9246, for plaintiff/opposing party.

The matter was argued, At the conclusion of arguments, DEFENDANT KARMAN HEALTHCARE INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is taken under submission by the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

*********************************************************************************************

After hearing, the court issued its ruling: DEFENDANT KARMAN HEALTHCARE INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Order signed. (302)
